info.title: Enterprise Task Management System API
info.description: Complete REST API specification for the Enterprise Task Management System. Features Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA/2FA via Microsoft Authenticator), Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), Real-Time Socket.IO Notifications, Department & Team Scoping, and Attendance & Leave Management.

post.description: Creates a new employee account with role and department assignment. Supports optional multipart/form-data avatar upload.

400.description: Validation error or user already exists

post.description: Authenticates user credentials. If 2FA is enabled, returns `requires2FA: true` and a temporary token.
Verifies the 6-digit TOTP code from Microsoft Authenticator using the temporary token issued during login.

200.description: 2FA verified successfully. Full session tokens issued.

401.description: Invalid or expired OTP verification code

post.summary: Generate 2FA QR Code for Microsoft Authenticator setup
post.description: Generates a new base32 TOTP secret and returns a Data URL QR Code image ready to be scanned.
Validates the initial 6-digit code from Microsoft Authenticator against the secret to activate MFA on the account.
Disables MFA protection. Requires current account password confirmation.
Generates a new access token using the refresh token stored in HTTP-only cookies or authorization header.
Clears authentication cookies and invalidates session.

get.description: Returns projects filtered by user visibility rules and optional department filter.

post.description: Creates a new project assigned to an optional department. Requires `create_project` permission.

get.summary: Get all members of a project

post.summary: Create a new task in a project

description.example: Add JWT verification and RBAC checks

get.summary: Get all tasks for a project
Get all tasks across all projects (Admin only)
Get tasks assigned to the current user

patch.summary: Update task details (title, priority, due date)

post.summary: Create a new department (Super Admin only)

get.summary: Get all employees belonging to department
Get teams led by or containing current user

post.summary: Create a new team (Admin / Dept Head)

get.summary: Get all members of a team

post.summary: Add member to team (Team Lead / Admin)

get.summary: Get historical attendance records for current employee
Get organization-wide daily attendance logs (Admin / HR)
Get monthly attendance summary report (Admin / HR)
Get leave quota balances for current employee
Get list of colleagues currently on leave
Get pending leave requests requiring approval (Admin / HR / Head)

patch.summary: Approve or reject leave application (Admin / HR / Head)

post.summary: Allocate leave quotas across employees (Super Admin only)

get.summary: Get salary deduction report for unpaid leaves (Admin / HR)

post.summary: Create new employee account (Super Admin / Admin / HR)

put.summary: Update employee profile & avatar (Super Admin / Admin / HR)

delete.summary: Deactivate employee account (Super Admin / Admin / HR)

get.summary: Get analytical metrics for projects and tasks
Get count and list of active in-progress tasks
Get 7-day task completion trend chart data
Get system-wide admin KPIs (Super Admin / Admin only)
Get system audit logs (Super Admin only)
Global system search across projects, tasks, and members

User.description: Complete Employee / User Account Schema representing the `users` table along with joined organizational relations.

two_factor_secret.description: Base32 TOTP secret for Microsoft Authenticator (excluded in public profile responses)

Role.description: System Role Schema representing the `roles` table.

description.example: Department or Project Manager with team oversight

Project.description: Project Schema representing the `projects` table along with creator and department relations.

ProjectMember.description: Project Member Assignment Schema representing the `project_members` junction table.

Task.description: Task Schema representing the `tasks` table with assignees and project details.

description.example: Add JWT verification and RBAC checks

TaskComment.description: Task Comment Schema representing the `task_comments` table.

Department.description: Organizational Department Schema representing the `departments` table with aggregate statistics.

Team.description: Team Schema representing the `teams` table within a department.

TeamMember.description: Team Member Schema representing the `team_members` junction table.

Attendance.description: Daily Employee Attendance Schema representing the `attendance` table.

Leave.description: Employee Leave Application Schema representing the `leaves` table.

LeavePolicy.description: Leave Quota Policy Schema representing the `leave_policies` table.

description.example: Standard paid annual leave for all full-time employees

AuditLog.description: System Audit Trail Schema representing the `audit_logs` table.

details.example: Added user ID 5 as Member to project 10

Notification.description: In-App Notification Schema representing the `notifications` table.

message.example: You have been assigned to 'Implement Authentication Middleware'

DashboardSummary.description: Analytical KPI Summary Schema returned by `/v1/dashboard/projects-summary`.

AuthResponse.description: Standard Authentication Session Response returned upon login or registration.
